package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for map_growth_without_size_hint: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Map insertions inside loops without a visible size hint on the initial make call.
type CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintModel
}

type CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintService struct {
    repo *CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMapGrowthWithoutSizeHint(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMapGrowthWithoutSizeHintDTO) error {
    focus := "map_growth_without_size_hint"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    map_growth_size_hint_negative := map[string]int{"map": 1, "growth": 2, "size": 3, "hint": 4}
    map_growth_size_hint_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    map_negative_0 := map_growth_size_hint_negative["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_negative_0
    growth_negative_1 := map_growth_size_hint_negative["growth"] + len(input)
    _ = growth_negative_1
    size_negative_2 := map_growth_size_hint_negative["size"] + len(input)
    _ = size_negative_2
    hint_negative_3 := map_growth_size_hint_negative["hint"] + len(input)
    _ = hint_negative_3
    return nil
}
